name: MetricFlux

pricing_tiers.notes: Adds unlimited data sources, custom SQL, dedicated support

features: real-time dashboards with sub-minute refresh rates
data lineage tracking with full audit trail of data transformations
anomaly detection powered by statistical models (GA)
NexusCRM native connector (real-time, no rate limit issues)
email and Slack alert triggers on metric thresholds
known_limitations: 8 native data connectors on Business tier — TaskBridge connector in roadmap Q2 2025, not yet available
Custom SQL queries require Advanced tier
Limited to 15 seats on Business tier
No embedded reporting for client self-serve (white-label view is read-only for clients)
Data connector library significantly smaller than InsightDeck (8 vs 40+ native connectors)
notes: At Business tier: £290/mo vs InsightDeck £340/mo = £50/mo saving (£600/yr). Migration at 8hrs × £48 = £384, amortised £128/yr. Net = £472/yr — below £1,200 threshold. Resolves: data lineage tracking (compliance gap), anomaly detection, CRM rate limit issue (real-time native connector), mobile view. Does NOT resolve: TaskBridge connector absent (Q2 2025 roadmap), client self-serve embedded reporting. Partial stack coverage is the blocker. Strong HOLD candidate — reassess Q2 2025 when TaskBridge connector ships.
